summary: Tested Call Support quotations access, Customer Dashboard quotations section, Monthly Reconciliation Reports, and PI notifications. Found 1 CRITICAL BUG: Call Support cannot access master-skus endpoint (403), blocking quotation creation. All other features working correctly.

critical.issue: Call Support role (call_support) cannot access master-skus endpoint - returns 403 Insufficient permissions. This blocks quotation creation as the form needs SKU data.
critical.fix_required: Add 'call_support' to require_roles on line 5948 of server.py: require_roles(['admin', 'accountant', 'call_support'])

ui_bugs.issue: Shows 'Failed to load form data' toast when call_support tries to create quotation - caused by backend master-skus 403 error

action_items: CRITICAL: Add 'call_support' role to /api/master-skus endpoint (line 5948 in server.py) - currently only allows ['admin', 'accountant']
After fix, call_support will be able to create quotations without 'Failed to load form data' error
critical_code_review_comments: The firms endpoint was fixed to include call_support (line 5799), but master-skus endpoint was missed
QuotationForm.jsx fetches both /api/firms and /api/master-skus - firms works but master-skus fails for call_support
Reconciliation Reports page working correctly with all 4 sections (Purchase, Sales, Payment, GST)
Customer Dashboard quotations section working correctly - shows pending quotations count and list
PI approval/rejection notifications are being created in database correctly

success_rate.frontend: 90% (Reconciliation and Customer Dashboard working, Call Support quotation form blocked by backend bug)

seed_data_creation: Created test customer testcustomer_1774433977@example.com during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Call Support quotations page loads but form fails due to master-skus 403. Fix: Add call_support to master-skus endpoint roles. Reconciliation Reports at /accountant/reconciliation working. Customer Dashboard shows quotations section with pending count badge.

features_tested.call_support_firms_access: PASS - Call support can access /api/firms endpoint
features_tested.call_support_quotations_list: PASS - Call support can view quotations list
features_tested.call_support_quotation_form: FAIL - Shows 'Failed to load form data' due to master-skus 403
features_tested.reconciliation_purchase_section: PASS - Shows purchase vs stock inward comparison
features_tested.reconciliation_sales_section: PASS - Shows sales vs dispatch comparison
features_tested.reconciliation_ui: PASS - Page loads with all sections visible
features_tested.customer_dashboard_quotations_stat: PASS - Shows quotations count in stats
features_tested.customer_dashboard_quotations_section: PASS - Shows My Quotations section with pending badge
features_tested.customer_quotations_list: PASS - Shows quotations with status badges
features_tested.pi_approval_notification: PASS - Notification created when PI approved

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: When fixing the firms endpoint to include call_support role (line 5799), the master-skus endpoint (line 5948) was not updated. Both endpoints are required for quotation creation.
reproduction_steps: 4. Observe 'Failed to load form data' toast error
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Add 'call_support' to the require_roles decorator on line 5948: user: dict = Depends(require_roles(['admin', 'accountant', 'call_support']))
